name: claude-pilot-suite
description: Portable execution playbook for Claude Code — three pilot modes (Haiku-first, Sonnet-first, Opus-first ceiling-elevation) covering cost-optimal to quality-ceiling task execution via sub-agent delegation, quantitative escalation gates, and beyond-vanilla-Opus mechanisms (Reverse-Advisor / Parallel Hypotheses / CAR / Decision-Log / Meta-Harness).
